posts.text:
oh my god




Newt Gingrich (@newtgingrich)

Instead of fighting over a 21-mile-wide bottleneck forever, we cut a new channel through friendly territory. A dozen thermonuclear detonations and you’ve got a waterway wider than the Panama Canal, deeper than the Suez, and safe from Iranian attacks. chinatalk.media/p/its-time

Community note: The open letter ends with:
"The views expressed above do not necessarily represent those of anyone with brain cells" 
chinatalk.media/p/its-time



— https://ni
Trump is crashing out and attacking his own base, telling them that if they don’t like Fox host Mark Levin—one of the biggest proponents of Trump’s war—they’re not MAGA.

Trump has made the United States a pariah state


AFP News Agency (@AFP)

BREAKING Japan says it is "not considering" maritime security operations after US President Donald Trump called for other countries to send warships to help protect the Strait of Hormuz





— https://nitter.net/AFP/status/2033364942250725858#m

When a U.S. president is begging China for help, you know things are very, very bad.


Bloomberg (@business)

Donald Trump said he could delay his planned summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping if Beijing doesn’t help unblock the Strait of Hormuz, the Financial Times reported, citing an interview with the US president bloomberg.com/news/articles/…




— https://nitter.net/business/status/2033333205646848493#m

He’s begging like a dog after telling everyone the U.S. already won and didn’t need any help


Aaron Rupar (@atrupar)

Trump on Strait of Hormuz: "Really, I'm demanding that these countries come in and protect their own territory, because it is their territory ... they should help us. You could make the case that maybe we shouldn't be there at all, because we don't need it. We have a lot of oil."

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/atrupar/status/2033348821850136829#m

He doesn’t give a damn about them


Acyn (@Acyn)

Reporter: Do you have a comment on the six service members who died last week?

Trump: *moves to next question* Who else?

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Acyn/status/2033352903239274678#m

Disgraceful


Acyn (@Acyn)

Reporter: Can you explain why you’re sending 5000 marines and sailors?

Trump: You’re a very obnoxious person.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Acyn/status/2033350867739463848#m

Trump is crashing out and attacking his own base, telling them that if they don’t like Fox host Mark Levin—one of the biggest proponents of Trump’s war—they’re not MAGA.
Trump has made the United States a pariah state
He’s flailing. He’s leading the country—and the world—toward catastrophe. When incompetence mixes with arrogance, the result is dangerous for everyone.
The dude is circling the drain. He’s now calling on people in media to be imprisoned for treason if they don’t report on the war to his liking.
This Weekend in Politics, Bulletin 328. Everything you need to know about what happened this weekend in politics. open.substack.com/pub/meidasto...
Trump golfs as American service members die in his war
Mayor Zohran Mamdani hit the court at Marcus Garvey Park, sinking a three with Knicks’ Mohamed Diawara after sharing Iftar at Harlem’s beloved Senegalese spot, Keur Yayeu Dara
As reported on Meidas News on Thursday: meidasnews.com/news/trump-o...
Nothing says “everything is under control” like someone constantly yelling at everyone not to panic
Why does Trump need allies to help him in a war he’s already won?

This moment from Feb 2025 may go down as one of the most prescient exchanges in modern diplomatic history. Zelenskyy warned Trump that while the United States may feel protected by an ocean today, a time could come when America would need help in war. Trump scolded him instead.

He is begging like a dog, one might say.

This war and Trump’s alienation of our allies may go down as among the greatest foreign policy failures of any presidency in history.
Join us. Let’s keep growing:

The truth is this war has been a failure of historic proportions. They don’t want Americans to know that. But we will never stop covering it honestly and with the critical lens that something this serious deserves.

Brendan Carr is threatening the media to cover the war the way the Trump regime wants. It’s one of the most anti-American messages ever posted by a government official.

1/

Ben and Popok take the controls of the top-rated Legal AF Podcast, breaking down news from Iran to the courts and Congress, plus the Fed and Supreme Court. They cover scandals rocking the administration and new pay-to-play allegations tied to Trump and his family. Tune in LIVE at 8 pm ET!

Trump practically told our allies to f-off — that we didn’t need them, that the U.S. had already “won.”

Now he’s begging them for help.

Trump says the U.S. will be “bombing the hell out of the shoreline” and shooting Iranian boats out of the water to keep the Strait of Hormuz open, while claiming Iran’s military has been “100% destroyed” (not true). He also called on China, France, Japan, South Korea, and the U.K. to send warships.

that decision could change if Iran interferes with shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. Iran exports 90% of its crude via Kharg Island, for shipping through the narrow Strait of Hormuz. Trump’s claims have not been independently verified at this time. 2/2

BREAKING: Donald Trump claims the U.S. carried out a major bombing raid on Iran’s Kharg Island, saying U.S. forces “totally obliterated” military targets there. He says the U.S. chose not to destroy the island’s oil infrastructure but warned… 1/
